pi_items.source: Verified against verifier.py and export_result.sh which strictly require row_count >= 50 for the CSV and total_configs >= 50 for the JSON report.
Verified against verifier.py which requires joints_varied >= 3 for full points on Criterion 3.
Verified against the Python evaluation script in export_result.sh which explicitly checks max(vals) - min(vals) >= 40.0 when counting varied joints.
Verified against export_result.sh and verifier.py which explicitly check len(pos) >= 3 and obs_placed >= 3.
Verified against export_result.sh which explicitly reads the CSV from this path.
Verified against export_result.sh which explicitly reads the JSON report from this path.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for coppeliasim_env collision_config_map task by confirming that the task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the programmatic creation of a collision configuration map in a CoppeliaSim scene. Verified that the expected output paths (/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/collision_map.csv and collision_report.json), the requirement for at least 3 obstacles, varying at least 3 joints by a minimum of 40 degrees, and testing at least 50 configurations all exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and the grading criteria in verifier.py and export_result.sh.
